title: 「Someone / Anyone / Everyone + 形容詞」句型
titleEn: Using someone, anyone and everyone with adjectives

source.file: Sentence Structure 52 -「Someone _ Anyone _ Everyone + 形容詞」句.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: someone / anyone / everyone + adjective or adjective phrase + other information

formulas.formula: someone / anyone / everyone + adjective or adjective phrase + other information

example: We need to hire someone experienced to lead this team.
exampleZh: 我們需要僱用一個有經驗的人來領導這個團隊。

examples.en: We need to hire someone experienced to lead this team.
examples.zh: 我們需要僱用一個有經驗的人來領導這個團隊。

examples.en: Is there anyone available to help me right now?
examples.zh: 現在有沒有任何有空的人可以幫助我？

examples.en: Everyone present at the meeting signed the agreement.
examples.zh: 所有出席會議的人都在協議上簽了字。

meaning.zh: Someone + 形容詞表示某個具有該特質的人；anyone 表示任何符合條件的人；everyone 表示所有具有該特質的人。

rules.en: The adjective must follow someone, anyone or everyone.
rules.zh: 形容詞必須放在 someone、anyone 或 everyone 後面。

rules.en: Someone means an unspecified person and is usually used in affirmative statements.
rules.zh: Someone 通常用於肯定句，表示一個身分未指明或並不重要的人。

rules.en: Anyone is common in questions, negatives and conditions, and can mean any person who meets a condition.
rules.zh: Anyone 常見於疑問句、否定句、條件句和表示任何符合條件的人的肯定句。

rules.en: Everyone refers to all relevant people but takes a singular verb.
rules.zh: Everyone 表示所有相關的人，但文法上視作單數，後面的動詞須使用單數形式。

rules.en: More information can follow the adjective, including a prepositional phrase or infinitive.
rules.zh: 形容詞後面可以加入介詞片語、不定詞、程度資料或另一個形容詞。

rules.en: Do not add person or people after someone, anyone or everyone.
rules.zh: Someone、anyone 和 everyone 本身已代表人，不要在後面再加 person 或 people。

benefits.zh: 可把 a person who is... 或 all the people who are... 縮短，使句子更直接。

benefits.en: It describes an unnamed person naturally.
benefits.zh: 可在不知道姓名或職位時，自然地說明所需人物的特質。

benefits.en: It helps you identify the right kind of person.
benefits.zh: 可在 someone、anyone 或 everyone 後加入具體條件，清楚指出所需人選。

benefits.en: It is useful for questions, requests and offers.
benefits.zh: Anyone + 形容詞特別適合用來詢問是否有人符合某項條件。

benefits.en: It helps avoid repetitive relative clauses.
benefits.zh: 可減少重複使用 a person who is... 等關係子句，使說話和寫作更流暢。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using someone, anyone or everyone followed by an adjective or adjective phrase.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 someone、anyone 或 everyone 加形容詞或形容詞片語改寫以下句子。
答案必須保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I need a patient person to explain this problem to me.
questions.promptZh: 我需要一個有耐性的人向我解釋這個問題。
questions.answer: I need someone patient to explain this problem to me.
questions.answerZh: 我需要找一個有耐性的人向我解釋這個問題。
questions.highlight: I need someone patient to explain this problem to me.

questions.prompt: We should ask a person with experience for advice.
questions.promptZh: 我們應該向一個有經驗的人尋求意見。

questions.answerZh: 我們應該向一個有經驗的人尋求意見。
questions.highlight: We should ask someone experienced for advice.

questions.prompt: Did you meet any person who was interesting at the event?

questions.answer: Everyone absent received an email.

questions.prompt: The payment is for eligible people, and all of them will receive it.
questions.promptZh: 這筆款項是給合資格人士的，而他們所有人都會收到款項。

questions.prompt: Before the meeting begins, please check whether any person who is unfamiliar with the safety procedure needs an explanation.
questions.promptZh: 會議開始前，請查看是否有任何不熟悉安全程序的人需要解釋。
questions.answer: Before the meeting begins, please check whether anyone unfamiliar with the safety procedure needs an explanation.
questions.answerZh: 會議開始前，請查看是否有任何不熟悉安全程序的人需要解釋。
